title: Easy Chicken Tortilla Soup
ingredients: 3 10.75oz cans of cream of tomato soup
1 20oz can of black beans with liquid
1 large can of black olives, sliced
instructions: Combine all of the ingredients except the cilantro and the Tortilla chips, in a crock-pot and cook until heated through. Add the cilantro right before serving and garnish with the tortilla chips.
